text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Aaaah, what do I do?! I'm so excited I can't sit
still!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Fine... the outing's not until our next day off.
You'll get nothing done in this state. Good grief.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But how can I calm down?! Hehehe! Truly, thank
you so much for the wonderful present, Groove!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Lavish dresses, shining jewels—such gifts have my
heartfelt gratitude, of course...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
But I can't deny that creating new memories is
what makes me happiest. I just can't wait until our
trip!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
They say it's the best time of year to see the
camellias at the garden we'll be visiting.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
It's a big place, so don't run off in excitement and
get lost, okay?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll make sure to keep a tight hold on your
hand! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
P-pardon? No, you're not a child, so that
shouldn't be ne—

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad Father and the others gave me
permission—they're always worrying too much
about me!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
As soon as I told them it was you who invited me,
they had no objections. Ehehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Okay, okay. It will be my honor to serve as your bodyguard, my lady.
